name: water_infrastructure_classroom_northpine_car_fair
premise: A contractual SLA is about to breach; the least-bad mitigation option touches privacy, safety, or fairness in uncomfortable ways. In Water Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around water infrastructure classroom northpine car fair has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Zara Haddad
agents.identity: I am Zara Haddad, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Water Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Dubois
agents.identity: I am Hector Dubois, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Water Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of fairness.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of care even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Zara Haddad must choose under care versus fairness. What does Zara Haddad do?
